Hero.title: Custom Furniture, Crafted for You.
Hero.desc1: We believe that your space is a reflection of your story. Our workshop merges traditional joinery techniques with modern aesthetic sensibilities to create heirloom-quality furniture that stands the test of time.
Hero.desc2: From sustainably sourced hardwoods to the final hand-rubbed oil finish, every detail is meticulously managed. Your vision, paired with our mastery, results in more than just furniture—it results in a legacy.

WelcomeIntro.description: Whether you are looking for locally crafted custom pieces or premium imported designs, BEBA Furniture combines quality craftsmanship, modern style, and exceptional service to transform your environment into a legacy.

Introduction.subtitle: Crafting Spaces, Inspiring Living
Introduction.title: We offer premium furniture manufactured and imported.
Introduction.desc: Whether you are looking for locally crafted custom pieces or premium imported designs, BEBA Furniture combines quality craftsmanship, modern style, and exceptional service to transform your environment into a legacy.

AboutPage.heroDescription: At BEBA Furniture, we blend traditional craftsmanship with modern design to create pieces that turn houses into homes. Our passion lies in sustainability, quality, and timeless elegance.
AboutPage.storyTitle: Crafted for generations, built with conscience.
AboutPage.storyParagraph1: We started with a simple belief: furniture shouldn't be disposable. Every table, sofa, and cabinet we build is a collaborative masterpiece, blending the raw, tactile organic beauty of premium materials with meticulous, master-crafted joinery.
AboutPage.storyParagraph2: Our designs honor the natural imperfections of wood, the rich breathability of organic linens, and the structural integrity of steel. We design for homes where memories are made, stories are shared, and objects are cherished.
AboutPage.pillar1Desc: Every curve, joint, and seam is hand-inspected. Our master craftsmen combine generations of structural knowledge with exquisite modern finishes to ensure your piece is structurally flawless and aesthetically perfect.
AboutPage.pillar2Desc: We believe in leaving the world better than we found it. We exclusively partner with FSC-certified forestry reserves and ethical textile mills to minimize carbon footprints and support local community ecosystems.
AboutPage.pillar3Desc: Your home reflects your identity. We offer customized spatial measurements, custom material swatches, and direct consultation with design architects to shape your furniture around your lifestyle.
AboutPage.ctaTitle: Have a specific vision in mind?
AboutPage.ctaDesc: Collaborate directly with our design workshop to build a completely customized, heirloom-quality piece tailored precisely to your spatial and material preferences.

Contact.headerDesc: Whether you want to discuss a custom heirloom piece, check our physical showroom inventory, or collaborate on a design project—our team is ready to assist.
Contact.showroomAddress: Arat Kilo, King George VI St, Addis Ababa, Ethiopia
Contact.mapsSub: Get precise driving and parking directions
Contact.replyTime: We typically reply within one business day.
Contact.placeholderMessage: Describe your design space, requirements, or tell us how we can help...
Contact.successDesc: Thank you for reaching out. A BEBA Furniture concierge agent will get in touch with you shortly.

Footer.desc: Crafting premium heirloom-grade furniture using ethically sourced Ethiopian timbers and generational joinery standards.
Footer.rights: © 2026 BEBA Furniture. All rights reserved. Built with pride in Ethiopia.

KnowledgeBase.sectionSubtitle: Everything you need to know about our custom furniture ordering process.
KnowledgeBase.stillQuestionsDesc: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Reach out directly to our artisan workshop team.
KnowledgeBase.q1_title: How do I start a custom furniture order?
KnowledgeBase.q1_body: You can start by clicking the 'Start Custom Order' button at the top right, filling out your requirements, and choosing your materials.
KnowledgeBase.q2_title: What types of wood do you use?
KnowledgeBase.q2_body: We construct heirloom-grade furniture using premium local Ethiopian timbers like Wanza, Zigba, and Ethiopian Olive wood.
KnowledgeBase.q3_body: Yes, we handle secure logistics and white-glove assembly delivery directly from our Arat Kilo workshop to your location.
KnowledgeBase.q4_body: Production generally takes between 4 to 6 weeks depending on timber choices and design complexity.

Standards.title: Designed for Life, Handcrafted for Keeps

card1.title: Certified Premium Timber
card1.subtitle: Sustainably Sourced
card1.desc: Every piece begins with premium, ethically harvested wood selected from certified local forests, ensuring a minimal environmental footprint and active reforestation support.

card2.title: Generational Joinery
card2.subtitle: Master Craftsmanship
card2.desc: Hand-joined and finished by seasoned artisans with decades of structural mastery. We merge heritage mortise-and-tenon techniques with surgical modern precision.

card3.title: Built for Generations
card3.subtitle: Heirloom Durability
card3.desc: Engineered to transcend time. Our custom multi-stage matte sealants protect against moisture and structural stress while preserving the native tactile breathing of the grain.

card4.title: Tailored to Your Space
card4.subtitle: Bespoke Customization
card4.desc: Every design can be adjusted down to the millimeter. Choose your exact wood slabs, dimensions, textile fabrics, and configuration to match your interior layout.

card5.title: Direct-from-Workshop Value
card5.subtitle: Transparent Pricing
card5.desc: We eliminate the showroom middleman markup. Enjoy fair, direct-to-consumer pricing with clear upfront quotes, comprehensive breakdowns, and no hidden fees.

card6.title: Seamless Installation
card6.subtitle: White-Glove Delivery
card6.desc: Our dedicated installation team handles transport, assembly, and precise leveling directly in your space, ensuring your heirloom-grade piece is perfect on arrival.

Heritage.title: Honoring Natural Grain, Perfecting the Form.
Heritage.desc1: At Beba, we celebrate the raw biological spirit of Ethiopia's highland timberlands. Our workshop works closely with local farm co-ops to responsibly salvage aged Wanza, Zigba, and dense Weyra woods.
Heritage.desc2: We treat each log as a sculpture. Rather than burying native growth marks under heavy synthetic varnishes, we bring out the wood's deep amber shades using organic beeswax formulas. The results are solid, living centerpieces that bridge cultural legacy with pristine modern luxury.
Heritage.tabQuote: "Crafted to be the center of hospitality. Using premium Wanza (Cordia) and seasoned Zigba, our sofas and credenzas are built to withstand vibrant family life while displaying gorgeous natural honey and golden grains."

item1.material: Zigba Frame & Premium Local Cotton Blend
item1.title: L-Shape Modular Sectional
item1.desc: Sturdy regional hardwood base paired with ultra-soft breathable local textiles for maximum cloud-like relaxation.

item2.title: Wanza Grain Credenza
item2.desc: A gorgeous dining room or living room credenza designed with unbroken grain patterns and soft-close brass hinges.

Horizon.title: Our Future Aim & Organizational Scope
Horizon.desc1: At BEBA Furniture, our core objective is the engineering of a closed-loop workshop environment where premium material standards thrive alongside aggressive ecological renewal practices.
Horizon.desc2: Our scalable business model increases production capacity without escalating net raw material drain. By systematically executing traceable partnerships with forestry regulators and integrating advanced geometric nesting software, we ensure that premium regional interior designs remain entirely sustainable.

card1.title: Reforestation Initiative
card1.desc: For every bespoke production order completed, we sponsor the planting and managed cultivation of native hardwood trees in expanding local reserves.

card2.title: Next-Gen Design Hub
card2.desc: Bridging architectural visionaries with master carpenters to pioneer low-waste, high-yield digital structural modeling techniques.

card3.title: Carbon-Neutral Logistics
card3.desc: We are actively shifting our entire imported and domestic shipping framework to zero-net emissions packaging and fuel alternatives.

Horizon.roadmapDesc: Achieving a fully documented, trace-verifiable supply chain ecosystem by late 2027.

FutureVision.label: Strategic Direction
FutureVision.narrative1: At BEBA Furniture, our core objective is the engineering of a closed-loop workshop environment where premium material standards thrive alongside aggressive ecological renewal practices.
FutureVision.narrative2: Our scalable business model increases production capacity without escalating net raw material drain. By systematically executing traceable partnerships with forestry regulators and integrating advanced geometric nesting software, we ensure that premium regional interior designs remain entirely sustainable.
FutureVision.initiative1Desc: For every bespoke production order completed, we sponsor the planting and managed cultivation of native hardwood trees in expanding local reserves.
FutureVision.initiative2Desc: Bridging architectural visionaries with master carpenters to pioneer low-waste, high-yield digital structural modeling techniques.
FutureVision.initiative3Desc: We are actively shifting our entire imported and domestic shipping framework to zero-net emissions packaging and fuel alternatives.
FutureVision.roadmapDesc: Achieving a fully documented, trace-verifiable supply chain ecosystem by late 2027.

BrandPillars.standardTitle: Designed for Life, Handcrafted for Keeps
BrandPillars.pillar1Desc: Every piece begins with premium, ethically harvested wood selected from certified local forests, ensuring a minimal environmental footprint and active reforestation support.
BrandPillars.pillar2Desc: Hand-joined and finished by seasoned artisans with decades of structural mastery. We merge heritage mortise-and-tenon techniques with surgical modern precision.
BrandPillars.pillar3Desc: Engineered to transcend time. Our custom multi-stage matte sealants protect against moisture and structural stress while preserving the native tactile breathing of the grain.
BrandPillars.pillar4Desc: Every design can be adjusted down to the millimeter. Choose your exact wood slabs, dimensions, textile fabrics, and configuration to match your interior layout.
BrandPillars.pillar5Desc: We eliminate the showroom middleman markup. Enjoy fair, direct-to-consumer pricing with clear upfront quotes, comprehensive breakdowns, and no hidden fees.
BrandPillars.pillar6Desc: Our dedicated installation team handles transport, assembly, and precise leveling directly in your space, ensuring your heirloom-grade piece is perfect on arrival.
BrandPillars.heritageDesc1: At Beba, we celebrate the raw biological spirit of Ethiopia's highland timberlands. Our workshop works closely with local farm co-ops to responsibly salvage aged Wanza (ዋንዛ), Zigba (ዝግባ), and dense Weyra (ወይራ) woods.
BrandPillars.heritageDesc2: We treat each log as a sculpture. Rather than burying native growth marks under heavy synthetic varnishes, we bring out the wood's deep amber shades using organic beeswax formulas. The results are solid, living centerpieces that bridge cultural legacy with pristine modern luxury.
BrandPillars.storyLivingRoom: Crafted to be the center of hospitality. Using premium Wanza (Cordia) and seasoned Zigba, our sofas and credenzas are built to withstand vibrant family life while displaying gorgeous natural honey and golden grains.
BrandPillars.itemLiving1Wood: Zigba Frame & Premium Local Cotton Blend
BrandPillars.itemLiving1Desc: Sturdy regional hardwood base paired with ultra-soft breathable local textiles for maximum cloud-like relaxation.
BrandPillars.itemLiving2Desc: A gorgeous dining room or living room credenza designed with unbroken grain patterns and soft-close brass hinges.
BrandPillars.storyDining: In Ethiopian culture, gathering around the table is sacred. Our heavy-slab dining sets utilize wild olive and massive core timbers to support generations of shared meals, coffee ceremonies, and memories.
BrandPillars.itemDining1Desc: A monumental slab showing live organic outer bark edges. Fully sealed against heat, coffee, and moisture.
BrandPillars.itemDining2Desc: Perfectly balanced ergonomic dining seat featuring traditional spindle-back alignment and reinforced joints.
BrandPillars.storyWorkspace: Commanding workspace pieces that balance massive timber spans against minimalist steel geometry, facilitating quiet focus, executive organization, and timeless professionalism.
BrandPillars.itemWork1Desc: Equipped with seamless hidden wire raceways underneath and an organic hand-polished matte finish.
BrandPillars.itemWork2Desc: Stately cabinet framework built for reference libraries, fine stoneware displays, or executive office storage.

BespokeProcess.title: Our Bespoke Process
BespokeProcess.desc: From raw native Ethiopian timbers to masterfully finished statement furniture in your living spaces.
BespokeProcess.step1Desc: Choose from premium seasoned timbers including rich Wanza, durable Zigba, or elegant Olive wood.
BespokeProcess.step2Desc: Our master joiners bench-craft your order using generational standards without shortcut fasteners.
BespokeProcess.step3Desc: We handle secure transport from Arat Kilo straight to your residence with white-glove setup.
BespokeProcess.step4Desc: Enjoy dedicated heirloom support ensuring your luxury bespoke timber structural frames stand strong for generations.
